name: freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/month, manual tracking causes payment delays. We convert raw hours into formatted reports instead of manual tracking and formatting of hours.
problem_solved: Converting raw employee hours into formatted timesheet reports for payroll processing.
